pre-web.fact: The first website didn't exist yet. Tim Berners-Lee was still writing the proposal at CERN.

dawn.vibe: Gray backgrounds. Blue links. Under construction GIFs.
dawn.fact: The first banner ad (AT&T on HotWired) had a 44% click-through rate.

dialup.fact: AOL mailed 250M+ free trial CDs. They were coasters, frisbees, and sometimes actually used.

dotcom.vibe: Irrational exuberance. Sock puppets. IPO mania.
dotcom.fact: Pets.com spent $11.8M on a Super Bowl ad. The company folded 268 days later.

broadband.vibe: Always on. Napster. Away messages. No busy signals.
broadband.fact: Broadband surpassed dial-up in US homes in 2004.

web2.vibe: Round corners. Gradients. Beta badges. Tags > folders.
web2.fact: Time Magazine's 2006 Person of the Year was 'You.'

mobile.vibe: Pinch to zoom. 'There's an app for that.'
mobile.fact: The App Store launched with 500 apps. Today there are 2M+.

social.vibe: The feed. The like. The share. Friends became editors.

streaming.vibe: No buffering. Binge culture. Cord cutting.
streaming.fact: Netflix streaming surpassed DVD rentals in 2013.

algorithmic.vibe: For you. Recommended. Suggested. Chronological is dead.
algorithmic.fact: TikTok's algorithm can determine your interests in ~20 minutes.

ai.vibe: Generated. Synthetic. The web writes itself.
ai.fact: By 2025, estimated 90% of online content could be AI-generated.
